channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping of builders' waste, 21st June
item.description:
A bag of what appears to be builders' waste has been dumped on the grass bank in front of Beckenham Court at 2 the Avenue. This appeared overnight and was first visible on the morning of Sunday 21st June.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Never ending, 21st June
item.description:
More trash

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drummond Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 21st June
item.description:
Broken pane of glass in footpath you have to walk over. Sharp edges

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fair Acres, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dunmore Road by garages, 21st June
item.description:
Second FRIVE box I've seen dumped around here, this time it's with other rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlisle Road, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Street lights along Palace View not working correctly, e.g. outside three Palace View, 21st June
item.description:
This was reported over a month ago and still not resolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The slip road up to the roundabout has dangerous cracks and holes, 21st June
item.description:
The slip road up to the roundabout from Woolwich direction has dangerous holes in the surface. They damage vehicles and there are a number of reports of damaged tyres that have been wrongly closed by Greenwich. Greenwich has informed me it’s a Bexley responsibility. The whole roundabout is in terrible condition but that slipped up is outright dangerous. No photo as it’s not safe to stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 21st June
item.description:
Arrived over the weekend I believe like Saturday night as don’t think was there yesterday. Old office chair and multiple rubbish bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Beaconsfield Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden pallets, 21st June
item.description:
Please remove wooden pallets next to 40 Larch Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larch Way, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st June
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blanchedowne, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked off area, 21st June
item.description:
Hi i'm sure no one minds this when it's occasional or pragmatic, eg on the day of a delivery. However this is going a bit far, the house concerned has been unoccupied for over a year now and a more considerate approach is needed. thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No mot or tax, 21st June
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked here for months it has no mot or tax parked in residents parking bay parking is bad enough here already please remove ASAP thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dandridge Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 21st June
item.description:
Please remove fly tip of buggy on grass area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larch Way, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Growth bottom of tree, 21st June
item.description:
Have to walk in the road as can’t use the pavement due to growth at bottom of the trees

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Stephens Road, Enfield

item.title: Manhole cover raised up, 21st June
item.description:
Cover is loose and raised on one side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Swan Lane, Whetstone, Greater London

item.title: Daily domestic dumping, 21st June
item.description:
Thanks, as usual, for clearing up yesterday's dumped bags and all sorts. Lots more has appeared since, please could you do something to address the underlying issues.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty both bins, 21st June
item.description:

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 21st June
item.description:

item.title: Lake now smells very bad., 21st June
item.description:
The lake desperately needs cleaning. It stinks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-26, Carlton Parade, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damp baby stuff, 21st June
item.description:
Damp few bags of rubbish ,someone from long time every day keep damping rubbish bag next our bin stall I am tired to keep bringing inside our bin stall bin this people must be stop must be !!! baby stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marcon Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On pathway on church manorway, 21st June
item.description:
What is wrong ? As mention on lots of ti.es there's rubbish being dumped on the street. . And I have proof of the people it's number is 218 marmadon road next to church manorway so now fine them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
